title: cordia correae
intro: Cordia correae, also known as the Australian coral tree, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cordia correae include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and roots are often used in traditional medicine.
